description: A customer service agent needs to process a return request for a customer who received a damaged item.

nodes.task_description: Find the customer's original order using their order number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly locates the customer's order details.

nodes.task_description: Create a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) for the damaged item, specifying 'Damaged' as the reason.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates an RMA number.

nodes.task_description: Generate a prepaid return shipping label and email it to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates and sends the return label.
